portals.label: Command Center
portals.purpose: Global readiness, search command, route status, and endpoint map summary.

portals.label: Lifecycle Portal
portals.purpose: 30-stage runtime, stage state, selected route, terminal state, and run outputs.

portals.label: Evidence & Search Portal
portals.purpose: Governed search, source trust, evidence basket, probe status, and review queue.

portals.label: Portfolio Portal
portals.purpose: Thesis, portfolio action, weighting, risk/exposure, opportunity map, competitors.

portals.label: Breakthrough / Design Portal
portals.purpose: Gap detection, breakthrough class, advancement path, AutoDesign, feasibility, blueprints/specs.

portals.label: Acquisition / Package Portal
portals.purpose: Moat, value capture, acquirer map, acquisition fit, package construction/export.

portals.label: Update Governance Portal
portals.purpose: Source trust, package inspection, protected paths, validation, rollback, approval state.

portals.label: Q&A / Cognitive Portal
portals.purpose: Question classification, routed reasoning mode, evidence-backed answer workspace.

portals.label: Memory / Replay Portal
portals.purpose: Run history, replay, lifecycle memory, recursive self-ingestion, comparison surfaces.

portals.label: Existing-System Portal
portals.purpose: System ingestion, decomposition, weakness detection, replacement path, package route.

portals.label: System Diagnostics
portals.purpose: Raw route map, payload JSON, endpoint inventory, and audit proof.
